extension.description: Orion v2.4.0 - Ultimate streaming addon. Torrent sources: Torrentio, YTS, EZTV, 1337x, PirateBay. Direct streams: VidSrc, HydraHD, FlickyStream, Cineby. Supports Real-Debrid, Premiumize, AllDebrid. TMDB metadata with quality filtering.
extension.news: [2.4.0] Fixed torrent scrapers - Added PirateBay API, fixed 1337x mirrors, improved IMDB ID handling for Torrentio. Fixed direct stream playback issues.
